## Tech Stack

| Category | Details |
| :--- | :--- |
| **IDE** | [Antigravity](https://antigravity.google/) |
| **Core Stack** | [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/), [TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/) |
| **AI - Code Generation** | [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/app), [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/), [v0](https://v0.app/) |
| **AI - Image Generation** | [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/app) |
| **UI & Animation** | [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com/), [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/), [Motion](https://motion.dev/) |
